title: Chhau Dance
detailed_description: Chhau Dance is a semi-classical Indian dance with martial, tribal, and folk elements, traditionally performed in Odisha, Jharkhand, and West Bengal. It is famous for its elaborate masks and energetic movements.

title: Bidriware Craft
detailed_description: Bidriware is a metal handicraft from Bidar, Karnataka. It involves intricate silver inlay on blackened alloy, creating stunning ornamental objects and decorative items.
